# roumnd

Few typst-native icons drawn in cetz,
usable both in cetz canvases as well as standalone in `content`.

## Example

```typ
#import "@preview/roumnd:0.1.0": icons

#(icons.at(":"))(foreground: blue, background: black)
```

See the [the demo](https://codeberg.org/MultisampledNight/roumnd/src/tag/v0.1.0/doc/demo.typ)
and [its compiled representation](https://codeberg.org/MultisampledNight/roumnd/src/tag/v0.1.0/doc/demo.pdf)
for all currently supported icons.
